g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user input work in QueryMind?')
sendPrompt('What does app.js send to the backend?')
sendPrompt('What does Flask do with the incoming request?')
sendPrompt('What prompt does QueryMind send to Groq?')
sendPrompt('When does QueryMind return a plain text answer?')
sendPrompt('What SQL operations does QueryMind block?')
sendPrompt('How does DuckDB execute the SQL query?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a SQL query fails?')
sendPrompt('What data does Flask return to the frontend?')
sendPrompt('How does Chart.js pick the right chart type?')
sendPrompt('What does the user see after QueryMind responds?')
